title: Research Frontiers in CSP
description: Orientation to the primary CSP literature and open research directions, including efficient real-time hardware implementation of cyclic spectral estimators.
objectives: Identify the primary CSP literature (Gardner, Napolitano, Spooner) and how it fits together as a reading path
Identify legitimately open research directions in CSP, including hardware-efficient real-time cyclic spectral estimation
Describe how to move from textbook-level understanding to reproducing and eventually extending published results
